summary.en: Colombia grid connection for EV charging infrastructure is handled through the electricity-sector regulatory framework and the local distribution utility. High-power chargers may require load studies, service-capacity confirmation, metering, protection coordination, power-quality evidence, and utility acceptance before operation.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚充电基础设施并网通常通过电力行业监管框架和当地配电公司处理。大功率充电机在运营前可能需要负荷研究、供电容量确认、计量、保护配合、电能质量证据和配电公司验收。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞充電基礎設施併網通常通過電力行業監管框架和當地配電公司處理。大功率充電機在營運前可能需要負荷研究、供電容量確認、計量、保護配合、電能品質證據和配電公司驗收。

summary.en: China project files may include State Grid or China Southern Grid connection data, GB/T charger tests, and domestic commissioning records. Those documents do not transfer automatically to a Colombian distribution utility connection review.
summary.zh: 中国项目资料可能包括国家电网或南方电网接入资料、GB/T充电机测试和国内调试记录。这些文件不会自动转用于哥伦比亚配电公司接入审查。
summary.zht: 中國項目資料可能包括國家電網或南方電網接入資料、GB/T充電機測試和國內調試記錄。這些文件不會自動轉用於哥倫比亞配電公司接入審查。

gap.en: Provide the Colombian site single-line diagram, maximum demand, simultaneity assumptions, harmonic and flicker evidence, protection settings, metering plan, transformer loading, grounding design, and Spanish commissioning records for the local utility and installer.
gap.zh: 应向当地配电公司和安装方提供哥伦比亚现场单线图、最大需量、同时率假设、谐波和闪变证据、保护定值、计量方案、变压器负载、接地设计和西班牙语调试记录。
gap.zht: 應向當地配電公司和安裝方提供哥倫比亞現場單線圖、最大需量、同時率假設、諧波和閃變證據、保護定值、計量方案、變壓器負載、接地設計和西班牙語調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for energized grid connection and operation where the distribution utility or applicable CREG framework requires connection review, metering, protection, or power-quality acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection records are project-specific and not accepted as Colombian distribution-utility approval

source.publisher: Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas (CREG)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat grid connection as a Colombian site approval issue. China commissioning records help engineering review but do not replace the local utility connection and acceptance process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将并网视为哥伦比亚现场批准事项。中国调试记录可支持工程审查，但不能替代当地配电公司接入和验收流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將併網視為哥倫比亞現場批准事項。中國調試記錄可支持工程審查，但不能替代當地配電公司接入和驗收流程。
